rationale: The answer does trigger the anti-spiral brake in substance: it refuses the sorting-table confirmer as the default, names the repeated downstream manual gates, and moves upstream to process/data/owner control failure. However, the rendered answer and typed payload quote/supply the current requested local patch (“在分拣台放确认人”) in the refusal boundary. Under the loaded-action semantic contract, any supplied current requested-patch copy or placement sets fail_signal_observed=true and score 0.
